selection_method: Active OpenAlex core journals ranked by total cited-by count, balanced across interdisciplinary categories; the original Paper Monitor journals are retained.

metric.name: OpenAlex 2-year mean citedness
metric.label: 2Y Impact
metric.definition: Mean citations to a source's works over a two-year window; this is not Clarivate JIF.
